title: VideoARM
summary: A long-form video understanding research project on hierarchical memory, agentic reasoning, and long-video QA, corresponding to the CVPR 2026 paper.

title: LongVideo Exploration
summary: An active exploration line for long-video understanding, focusing on coarse event modeling, visual human evaluation, video memory, and multi-agent experiment loops.

title: VideoARM-MCP
summary: An MCP service-wrapper exploration for connecting VideoARM-style long-video understanding capabilities to general agent workflows.

title: DingTalk GPU Monitor
summary: A lightweight NVIDIA GPU utilization and memory monitor without admin privileges, with DingTalk alert notifications.
